languages.text: {n}...под вашими ногами простирается широкая, богато изукрашенная палуба пустотного корабля. Зрелище одновременно завораживает вас и наполняет странным ужасом — как будто бы вы уже видели все это, как будто бы сам вид, открывшийся вам — вестник чудовищного бесконечного кошмара...{/n}

{n}...the broad, sumptuously ornate deck of a voidship stretches out beneath your feet. The sight both fascinates you and fills you with a strange horror — as if you have seen all this before, as if the very sight before you presages the arrival of a monstrous, endless nightmare....{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}...под вашими ногами простирается широкая, богато изукрашенная палуба пустотного корабля. Зрелище одновременно завораживает вас и наполняет странным ужасом — как будто бы вы уже видели все это, как будто бы сам вид, открывшийся вам — вестник чудовищного бесконечного кошмара...{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}...the broad, sumptuously ornate deck of a voidship stretches out beneath your feet. The sight both fascinates you and fills you with a strange horror — as if you have seen all this before, as if the very sight before you presages the arrival of a monstrous, endless nightmare....{/n}

{n}...the broad, sumptuously ornate deck of a voidship stretches out beneath your feet. The sight both fascinates you and fills you with a strange horror — as if you have seen all this before, as if the very sight before you presages the arrival of a monstrous, endless nightmare....{/n}

languages.text: {n}... la amplia y suntuosa cubierta de una nave del vacío se extiende bajo tus pies. La visión te fascina, y al mismo tiempo te infunde un extraño terror; es como si ya hubieras visto antes todo esto, como si la imagen que tienes ante ti fuese el presagio de una pesadilla monstruosa e interminable...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}...the broad, sumptuously ornate deck of a voidship stretches out beneath your feet. The sight both fascinates you and fills you with a strange horror — as if you have seen all this before, as if the very sight before you presages the arrival of a monstrous, endless nightmare....{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}... la amplia y suntuosa cubierta de una nave del vacío se extiende bajo tus pies. La visión te fascina, y al mismo tiempo te infunde un extraño terror; es como si ya hubieras visto antes todo esto, como si la imagen que tienes ante ti fuese el presagio de una pesadilla monstruosa e interminable...{/n}

languages.text: {n}……一片宽阔且装饰华丽的虚空舰甲板在你脚下延展开来。眼前的景象既让你着迷，又让你心中充满一种诡异的恐惧——仿佛你早就见过这一切，仿佛你眼前的这一幕，正预示着某个狰狞可怖、永无止境的噩梦即将降临……{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}...the broad, sumptuously ornate deck of a voidship stretches out beneath your feet. The sight both fascinates you and fills you with a strange horror — as if you have seen all this before, as if the very sight before you presages the arrival of a monstrous, endless nightmare....{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}……一片宽阔且装饰华丽的虚空舰甲板在你脚下延展开来。眼前的景象既让你着迷，又让你心中充满一种诡异的恐惧——仿佛你早就见过这一切，仿佛你眼前的这一幕，正预示着某个狰狞可怖、永无止境的噩梦即将降临……{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sous vos pieds s'étend le grand pont somptueusement décoré d'un vaisseau. Cette vue vous fascine autant qu'elle suscite en vous un étrange sentiment d'horreur, comme si vous aviez déjà vécu ce moment et saviez qu'il annonce le commencement d'un monstrueux cauchemar sans fin...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}...the broad, sumptuously ornate deck of a voidship stretches out beneath your feet. The sight both fascinates you and fills you with a strange horror — as if you have seen all this before, as if the very sight before you presages the arrival of a monstrous, endless nightmare....{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sous vos pieds s'étend le grand pont somptueusement décoré d'un vaisseau. Cette vue vous fascine autant qu'elle suscite en vous un étrange sentiment d'horreur, comme si vous aviez déjà vécu ce moment et saviez qu'il annonce le commencement d'un monstrueux cauchemar sans fin...{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bir uçsuz gemisinin geniş, görkemli bir şekilde süslenmiş güvertesi, ayaklarının altında uzanıyor. Bu manzara seni hem büyülüyor hem de tuhaf bir dehşetle dolduruyor. Sanki tüm bunları daha önce görmüşsün gibi, sanki gözlerinin önündeki manzara korkunç, sonsuz bir kâbusun gelişini haber veriyormuş gibi...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}...the broad, sumptuously ornate deck of a voidship stretches out beneath your feet. The sight both fascinates you and fills you with a strange horror — as if you have seen all this before, as if the very sight before you presages the arrival of a monstrous, endless nightmare....{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir uçsuz gemisinin geniş, görkemli bir şekilde süslenmiş güvertesi, ayaklarının altında uzanıyor. Bu manzara seni hem büyülüyor hem de tuhaf bir dehşetle dolduruyor. Sanki tüm bunları daha önce görmüşsün gibi, sanki gözlerinin önündeki manzara korkunç, sonsuz bir kâbusun gelişini haber veriyormuş gibi...{/n}

languages.text: {n}... das breite, aufwändig verzierte Deck eines Raumschiffs erstreckt sich unter deinen Füßen. Der Anblick fasziniert dich und weckt ein seltsames Entsetzen in dir ... als hättest du all das schon einmal gesehen. Als würde der Anblick einen monströsen, endlosen Albtraum ankündigen ...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}...the broad, sumptuously ornate deck of a voidship stretches out beneath your feet. The sight both fascinates you and fills you with a strange horror — as if you have seen all this before, as if the very sight before you presages the arrival of a monstrous, endless nightmare....{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}... das breite, aufwändig verzierte Deck eines Raumschiffs erstreckt sich unter deinen Füßen. Der Anblick fasziniert dich und weckt ein seltsames Entsetzen in dir ... als hättest du all das schon einmal gesehen. Als würde der Anblick einen monströsen, endlosen Albtraum ankündigen ...{/n}

languages.text: {n}...空飛ぶ船の広々とした豪華絢爛なデッキがあなたの足元を延びています。その光景はあなたを魅了する一方で、奇妙な恐怖感を与えます。まるであなたがこれを見たことがあるかのように、まるで目の前の光景が巨大で終わりなき悪夢の到来を予感しているかのように。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}...the broad, sumptuously ornate deck of a voidship stretches out beneath your feet. The sight both fascinates you and fills you with a strange horror — as if you have seen all this before, as if the very sight before you presages the arrival of a monstrous, endless nightmare....{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}...空飛ぶ船の広々とした豪華絢爛なデッキがあなたの足元を延びています。その光景はあなたを魅了する一方で、奇妙な恐怖感を与えます。まるであなたがこれを見たことがあるかのように、まるで目の前の光景が巨大で終わりなき悪夢の到来を予感しているかのように。{/n}
